reviews.review_msg: Smart man but his quizzes get harder and harder. If you're thinking of doing grad school you should definitely take his class. He can give you lots of advice and he's very knowledgeable!

Rob is a great person and he's really nice and funny. I enjoyed the course, I learned a lot but his quizzes get harder and harder and it seems like he doesn't scale at all. His lectures can be boring sometimes but he's very intelligent!
Great prof, one of the best. Changed my view of MBB
Very approachable, very kind, very helpful, and funny! Do as he says and you will be fine! Stick to the guidelines for presentation and paper, and for exam focus on how to analyze data!

I was very satisfied with this course because the mark distribution was very fair, not a lot of work required every week, just during presentation times or at the end of the semester. Great to take if you don't want to be constantly working all semester long! Very very happy with this prof in terms of this particular course!
